CustomField.formula: CASE( FCO_Type__c , 'Important Field Safety Notice', 'A', 'Important Field Safety Modification', 'B', 'Important User Notice', 'C', 'Important Product Modification', 'D', 'Product Bulletin', 'E', 'Product Modification', 'F', 'Product Recommendation', 'G', 'Internal Information Exchange', 'H', 'I')
CustomField.label: FCO Type Number
